title: ReviewMind -  Mining Meaning from Customer Chaos
impact: Unlocked previously unusable customer data and transformed it into actionable product intelligence.
tech: DotNet, Docker, SqlLite, Unstructured Data Processing, NLP (Sentiment Analysis & Keyword Extraction), Semantic Search

specs.storage: Custom Indexed Vector Store in SqlLite

features.semantic keyword search: Expanded user queries with related terms automatically; Improved search recall without user effort
features.dual-layer sentiment analysis: Combined sentence-level and review-level scoring; Identified _specific product weaknesses_, not just overall ratings
features.loosely coupled architecture: DTO-driven design enabled parallel team execution; Components were fully swappable (DB, NLP engine, ingestion layer)
features.rapid delivery under constraint: Built and deployed a full pipeline in 1 day; Won internal hackathon against multiple teams
features.business impact potential: Identify product pain points instantly; Surface high-value positive reviews for marketing; Enable data-driven product decisions

content: Transformed gigabytes of unstructured product reviews into a queryable intelligence layer using NLP and a modular batch-processing pipeline. Designed a loosely coupled architecture with DTO-driven boundaries, enabling parallel development and hot-swappable components. Delivered a working semantic search and sentiment engine in under 24 hours, winning the company hackathon.
